mapper.sql: id , company_name , company_address , hotLine , email , url , create_time , update_time , download_link , is_show
mapper.update:
update mlsd_company_profile
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
company_name = #{record.companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_address = #{record.companyAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hotLine = #{record.hotLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{record.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
download_link = #{record.downloadLink,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_show = #{record.isShow,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update mlsd_company_profile
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
company_name = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company_address = #{companyAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hotLine = #{hotLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
download_link = #{downloadLink,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_show = #{isShow,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , company_name , company_address , hotLine , email , url , create_time , update_time , download_link , is_show from mlsd_company_profile where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id , company_name , company_address , hotLine , email , url , create_time , update_time , download_link , is_show from mlsd_company_profile where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
